My order was ready in about 10 minutes.
The food court wasn't too busy, and the staff was friendly.
The pizza 🍕 tasted amazing, just like the usual delicious Domino's pizza.
The only downside in this mall is that you won't find any "buy one, get one free" offers, and I'm not sure why.
Overall, my experience was fantastic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPh_7WbJncT4Xw0IKevO0Qb4hrCJtVAMrbeJ3BA&fid=0x0:0xd6870c8c915e8ed1"],"When":"2023-8-23"},{"Name":"Kiran Shinde","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmGuOTPg_m3GW1TxYwLhQz1WZPkSn5ZPaPh5cJb9k4xdOZi4p0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered one margarita pizza and one veg mexican tacco. Just after placing the order I called restaurant and spoke with Mrs. Priyaka and asked her to send extra ketchup sachets with the order. She accepted and said okay and dropped the call. Delivery boy came with the order and he was not having ketchup sachets. Then I called restaurant and spoke with Mrs. Priyanka again then she said it's chargeable as I don't knows it is...! Whatever then I asked her to arrange the sachets of ketchup so she said delivery boy will get it and give it to you. As per my conversation with delivery boy he said "main thodi na ketchup leke ghumta hu" Then after my complaint to the restaurant he said "kitne ketchup chahiye...??? " Already he was having the sachets of ketchup in his bag still he didn't given it to me....! And after questioning him he went saying main nahi dunga...!
Very bad experience with this kind of service and the staff on the call not even telling their true names....!

Very dissatisfied...!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vijay Ravishankar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVERS_SvwrW4AaErRDZxLE6LDPBQnhf4LRuS0RHn9-sY1ZbCtcC4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The staff are too lazy not friendly and some delivery boy came in with chewing gutka. 5 stars to the staff for taking such efforts and delivering food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNa3v6Mv7Uq1k0GG6RIUxTKYmrrmB6o8b00-9pt&fid=0x0:0x7ca5e65b39ecb06b"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Anna Bisht","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXarSAPvyzfRaLRsU_lcf-mv9oJvMyUQ4V10mXYTJLuxUn0b7s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst experience. The pizza was good, real tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPYLZf3nfm9ys2_u-nE9KTbL5GCFGPkkug41NUL&fid=0x0:0x7ca5e65b39ecb06b"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Madalsa Aggarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL00qtGVBesENPdLR-mJwlvWwbaw39yEuz_8Q8yy_9qiqaTUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Please do not order food from dominos.
They took my money and don’t even bother to return it back. There is no coordination between their branches. Each staff is so rude. And service are terrible.

This is what happened with me:

I order pizza from dominos for green park location and I don’t know how it got in Amar Colony branch. It was a paid order. And it never got delivered to me. I waited for 4 hours and tried to contact them, but there was no response.

They cancelled it and never gave my refund.
I was not able to contact any single person in Dominos. It’s customer care is useless.

Somehow after complaining in consumer court I got a call from an executive in Amar Colony branch. He said that they can’t return back the money, they can deliver it again.

Next time when I ordered it was again transferred from green park branch.
The order was late 1.5 hours. The delivery guy asked to pay for the paid order itself, and started misbehaving with us instead and he took back the order and didn’t bother to deliver.

Then after another 1.5 hours they delivered me the order and the seal was broken. The seal was purposely removed.( I have attached the photo of broken seal). Order was late for 3 hours now. I talked to their shift manager named Arvind and he also misbehaved on call. He was asking me to accept the order and he was justifying his mistake by giving vague reasons.

And when I talked to the seniors they said we cannot refund. Nobody in the organisation is ready to listen. Especially the green park staff is so rude and misbehaving and doesn’t look after their customers at all.

It’s like once you give them your money. You consider it lost.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNR2-eWVNgnvwzgQ9tdsuHKObiHFOz5Xcm0mjaI&fid=0x0:0x7ca5e65b39ecb06b"],"When":"2022-9-17"},{"Name":"Surbhi Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTyfSkNZ2Px3aFdRIyC7OjEEnV3wsBr_tDXo10UsP-EUHutQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Totally uncleaned area and out of 3 A/C's, only 1 A/C is working. Very pathetic dine in experience. Worst than roadside cafe's","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"M M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeXam5f7zl94YVG4NM2dje_ylMHeJGwA9rfTV7I4kkxWNFdTUf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Giving these stars as there is no option for a zero. A woman ( can't call her a lady as she is uncouth) named  Kajal mans the counter. I don't believe that she wants any customer around as I observed her with others too. Her first sentence was 'order mein 25 se 30 minute lagenge'. We didn't want to search another eating joint  so took that with a pinch of salt . But Domino's is known to deliver in 20 mins while  we were dining in. Next she insisted on cash payment and refused online transactions or UPIs. We don't normally carry cash but somehow managed to pay. Later we ordered soft drinks and again paid in cash. This time we needed to pay her Rs. 240/- but had 210/- Then she changed her stance and said ' Rs. 30 /- Paytm kar do'. We refused and asked her not to backtrack. Then she arranged change for the cash payment. The AC was not working and it was very stuffy inside. The washroom was ' not in use'. Photo attached. The pizza was undercooked and toppings were less.  Will never come again. Sad she doesn't value or cash in on  such a central location at Lajpat Nagar","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP3TkbCz5q6aCg8xUL9z1ML0o6byVpyOplxUhas&fid=0x0:0x861cc64d911ee87c"],"When":"2024-2-18"},{"Name":"shweta malhotra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIky8xWkmBNiIlhJpIbCfIMjU5NKxiYA-o6D20DqW9NZWzjRPp4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Visited this outlet yesterday... Didn't feel like ordering but was super duper hungry...Most pathetic ambience.. Coke and tissue paper were spilled all over the place and none of the staff even bothered to clean it ... Watermarks and dirty foot prints were all over the place .. Washroom was in most pathetic condition...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anugrah Mishra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjcJZ5i3fvSXtOi1g_exJFbiO5XpQwVIxD77dM4pCdVOj3NHFV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Shut this outlet please! The new variety of 4 cheese pizza also seemed like 1/2 cheese pizza.

Switched to the awesome Mojo Pizza","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadeem Farooq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcWqb08ftF-kfMAwQE6D-V7fgB1sJR3fxGVKDhy0PXj3cZ9ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"There was a lady namely Kajal who is extremely rude,she troubled us while making online payment and was very arrogant.
Had mo manners at all.
No tissues, untidy tables, washrooms, floor and shabby staff.
Disaster!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meenakshi Kapoor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHy6SVeBVvt33RzY6v2KKPXyLpSH0mO0ghbH94s3Dv7EzTdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very bed experience in Lajpat nagar dominos I am not going ever","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMKITsedVEkIfUyYjaOp7Nxlz6zv6tfe0CyCC23&fid=0x0:0x861cc64d911ee87c"],"When":"2023-11-13"},{"Name":"Vasudha Keer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXx6DI5_oi-vqx1Ka5a7AyyAQ4pHgoF1cWV7ud8N1lBZeTXIyTs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hi,
I went to the Domino’s lajpat nagar ll,plot no.ll-D/34 Delhi branch with my friend on sunday 21/01/24.

My friend wants to use washroom and the lady name “Kajal” were not allowed to use the washroom.
Why washroom is not in use in domino’s where will guest go in emergency?
The staff of domino’s said that it is only for their use.
Then what about customers? This is the way of hospitality etiquette?
Why your staff is so unprofessional?
Continuously they are gossiping,laughing.
The lady name KAJAL she was very rude and arrogant with us.
When my friend insisted them to use the washroom the lady name KAJAL said “kuch log toh dhith hi hote hai”
This is the way to treat your guest,what’s going on with domino’s employees nowadays why they are having so much attitude.
I’m sharing with you the few pictures of that branch how they disrespect us while closing the washroom. If you are not wrong then why you are hiding your face while taking your pictures.
Be nice with others because we are humans too.
Give respect and take respect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO7Gs_1LNN0TFmyUt_kMYAzptu2nUz-Qeupwr46&fid=0x0:0x861cc64d911ee87c"],"When":"2024-1-21"},{"Name":"Aradhya Goel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOnDpMnJOJTEPGXrIUdHnzLx0ctMt2gu_jyB2o24wskfoEgfP1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have eaten here and have ordered from here too.

The dining service was slow but that was totally because the staff was quite understaffed. So it was not really their fault. And when we finally got the pizzas, they were so amazing!

Their deliveries are actually quite quick and the pizzas remain as tasty as ever. The pizzas are somehow much cheesier, better cooked than other Dominoz branches. Would definitely recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I wonder if adding a review or rating really works for this place, because nothing seems to change.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karan Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCK891Vf8gWklv8RkD6hKuU2vE1_umFzjyTGJNZtJUtLTUwmSK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"To all the employees working at dominoes who says that pan pizza cannot be crispy kindly look at the images I shared. He used PAN for pan pizza unlike you who doesn’t use PAN for pan pizza because you try to cheat people. He used magic oil a term used for an oil in your restaurant which is spread evenly on top of the pizza to make pizza crispy from all sides and beneath. So if you want some training kindly do it and don’t deceive people or argue that pan pizza cannot be crispy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMBoz8MuYZtN-HO1kUEbrNokZWtdcS5XXmPjgBP&fid=0x0:0x38597bd20a6d3396"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Nikita Yadav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ315s2GO4fv1zRTKfuRZDxKeycB6NSQLOElzoDd2FfmCKCjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst experience at this outlet!

The waiting could have been tolerated if the pizza was served in good condition atleast, this is the least expectation of a customer while visiting an outlet of yours. From the standards of Dominos it was quite impressive. Suggest you to try at least once as the cost is slightly on the higher side as compared to other Pizza brands offering better deals at lower prices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMLtoWsQI_6KBmCIPbCs4z5AqKJPMRpXc_hAgE8&fid=0x0:0x38597bd20a6d3396"],"When":"2022-12-13"},{"Name":"Kirat Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnDwioNtwwkfnEfDuTwHVYLv0dNASW7r_DzYGanAz0NO-1cUs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I recently visited Dominos pizza south extension and had an incredibly disappointing experience. The customer service was severely lacking, to say the least. It was frustrating to see that there was only one staff member handling everything—from taking orders to cleaning tables. The burden on this single person was evident, and it resulted in slow service and a chaotic environment.

If customer service is supposed to be a priority, this outlet has completely missed the mark. It's unacceptable to make customers feel like an afterthought. If the customer is truly king, they should be treated as such. Sadly, this was far from the case during my visit. Overall, it was a pathetic experience that I do not wish to repeat.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Himanshu Goswami","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbGZYvXSPEBLux4wki3Rymq8fYIoZ9AGcMVihqIXCjca_3GPp1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Poor service. Arrogant staff. No bill is been provided. Confusion with the order. Delay of 60 minutes and sad ambience and cleanliness. Had to request 5 times and wait for another half an hour just to get the bill.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPfrncpVG41gJKxsyq8tG8nyrNPZh2dFgKMjdhD&fid=0x0:0x20417b778be0dd85"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Aaron Walker plays (Aaron_Walker_007)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVak_krVpZmlKM_XbnoIKFx8P3wYNnIHYSzVmF0VoWqJcdE1fjM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Domino's Pizza - Saket Anupama Cinema complex

2/5 - VERY IMP, DON'T PLACE ORDER AND EXPECT TO CATCH MOVIE in 1 hr or less! Very slow service, poor management, rude staff, No decent ambience, Expensive.

This Domino's Pizza outlet is one of the most inefficient I have ever seen. Don't understand why they have pathetic and slow service, possibly because of less kitchen space or something.

The result is that, once u place an order, you are expected to wait a minimum 20 mins per pizza, 30 mins if restaurant is crowded. Since we ordered 2 pizzas, we were in for a ride.

It's good we didn't have a movie pending, but can u imagine? A couple could be spending their time roaming, sitting on a bench outside, enjoying the weather. Here, u waste ur time by ordering a pizza & even 30 mins later, it's coming.

What's worse, call it local populace, but this outlet was super noisy. So, sitting 30 mins in a super noisy environment is not a good activity for a couple! Seriously, not just mood killer, but hunger killer as well.

Very poor ambience, totally family vibes, instead of a private cafe type feel, which is present in some other Domino's outlets like in CP. Can't even have a decent conversation.

Anyway, I got fed up & went to cancel my order and take a refund, but the manager was swamped with 5 other people with similar requests & it seemed that would take 15-20 more mins, so we waited.

Another thing I disliked - they had an offer, apparently - mousse cup on a purchase of a minimum amount. We got 2 cups, but one of them was expired & in a bad state. So, it seemed they were trying to get rid of their old near expiry stock & didn't even care enough to check what they were passing on to the consumers.

It's a nightmare to go here & while I specify places to go again & again, places to go once & places to avoid, this place CREATES A NEW CATEGORY - READ THIS REVIEW, Feel empathy & forget about going at all! HIGHLY UNRECOMMENDED!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNTcdH8xh6srWgprOsVNi4Kq8LoQxqYcgaMAX39&fid=0x0:0x20417b778be0dd85"],"When":"2024-6-4"},{"Name":"Sonia Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRkJL8b9zd0fjK3xaE2i3-CXDi3_0kBxNNbUmiznuappJoQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff is very very arrogant....service is poor .... ordered cheese burst pizza got normal...messy tables .... definitely not a place to enjoy the meal","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOd9F2VfFMtm9zcQfTHm2VxItn7bhHQv9tAsyvB&fid=0x0:0x20417b778be0dd85"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Shashank Gautam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXTAH_EUlZlcb0SxMFMFYWtcac5YInR_H3LXhiDb379hlrIICy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They keep a banner of the lunch feast at the entrance and it is never available in this outlet. [{"Name":"Md Shahabuddeen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRYCOJ3WuiOsnkjYQrbNmdCb-OOs0dK09kvh2aT-I8lnpaJq6Nlw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Domino's Pizza is a clear winner when it comes to pizza chains in India, with a rating of 4.1 out of 5 stars ¹. People rave about their delicious pizzas, convenient ordering options, and reliable delivery service.
- *Variety of Options*: Domino's offers a wide range of pizzas, from classic Margherita to unique fusion pizzas like Chicken Tikka ¹.
- *Convenient Ordering*: Their website and app make ordering a breeze, with options for online payment, phone ordering, and walk-in ordering .
- *Fast Delivery*: Domino's delivery service is quick and reliable, with real-time tracking available .
- *Customer Service*: Their customer support team is prompt, polite, and helpful, resolving issues quickly ¹.
- *Rewards Program*: Domino's rewards program offers benefits like free pizza on your birthday, exclusive discounts, and early access to new menu items .
Some popular menu items include:
- *Margherita Pizza*
- *Farmhouse Pizza*
- *Peppy Paneer Pizza*
- *Chicken Dominator*
- *Deluxe Veggie Pizza*
Overall, Domino's is a great choice for pizza lovers in India, with its combination of delicious food, convenient ordering, and excellent customer service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMFlU3jc_QkNq_PYgopILpmye4En38z6V4gpng0&fid=0x0:0xfb3e9a8c9ea67983"],"When":"2024-9-15"},{"Name":"Vivek Mishra (Discretion)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-hT3lNsRJwGw6DMeC1LlXFcpN23AXr0KZAEjjOMLD7DCzbT0mxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"#Volcano ......The vegetables inside the pizza were cut in very big pieces. It's disgusting I have lost my money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yash Narula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoFzJwqf-U7DkAQFMdhRVhqugF6r0Dflgj_LHu-I0pUMPD0Hvp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In your outlet there is an employee name called Mr. Sanjay kumar, he doesn’t know the value of customer and even he doesn’t know how to talk with customer, he’s very arrogant and rude. Some Rahul from dominos even called me and was extremely rude, not ready to listen to me. Never ordering from here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMUzPbHVyXUA88F5hAbK40mV9gpg7neoafeDbrQ&fid=0x0:0xf5278bf9ecf42674"],"When":"2024-11-1"},{"Name":"Raghav Aggarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsGn2gP3kg9c5UBazM3KQ1vfHUYfdJhE-3M2CEWPQpuVKzwBsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"### Domino's Pizza Negative Review

I recently had a disappointing experience with Domino's Pizza. The delivery was significantly late, and the pizza arrived cold and soggy. The toppings were sparse, and the crust was chewy. Additionally, customer service was unresponsive and unhelpful. Overall, the quality and service were below expectations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMN795YALBP-0N8xhzY--mAjVeOqp_y8ia3tQrH&fid=0x0:0xf5278bf9ecf42674"],"When":"2024-6-14"},{"Name":"sunil flame","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWN4KZ6M1UbpbjrLns9NnBGdYGMed_MBotsKWNWw_DioxKYJrVr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I just visited a Domino's Pizza outlet, Munirka and I’m extremely disappointed with the service I received. The sales girl, Priyanka, did not even ask what I wanted. Instead, she simply walked away from the counter, leaving me completely unattended. This lack of basic customer service is unacceptable, especially from a brand like Domino's.

It was frustrating to be ignored like this, and it definitely left a negative impression.
